      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsUS Bank Account for US ResidentsAccepted Documents for ID Verification (US Residents).Accepted Documents for ID Verification (US Residents). Updated over 5 months agoTable of contentsIf you’re a US resident opening a US bank account with Raenest, you’ll need to verify your identity. This is a requirement under US law and helps us keep your account secure and compliant. Accepted documentsYou can complete verification using one of the following:Social Security Number (SSN) (Preferred)US Green CardUS PassportUS Driver’s LicenceUS Visa — the following visa types are accepted:​E-1, E-2, E-3 – Treaty trader, treaty investor, and specialty occupation visas (mainly work-related)L-1 – Intra-company transferee visa for employees moving to a US branchO-1 – For individuals with extraordinary ability or achievement (science, arts, education, business, athletics)H-1B – Specialty occupation work visaTN-1 – Work visa for Canadian professionals under NAFTA/USMCAG-4 – For employees of international organizations (e.g. UN, World Bank) and their familiesDACA – Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (not a visa, but accepted as proof of identity)EB-1 – Employment-based immigrant visaOur preferred verification methodWe highly recommend using your SSN whenever possible. The SSN is the most straightforward and reliable method of verification and ensures faster verification and uninterrupted access to your account, without needing to provide additional documents later. Important note for visa usersIf your country of residence is the US and you verify your identity using a visa instead of your SSN during onboarding:You will be required to provide your SSN within 4 weeks of joining Raenest.A reminder notice will be sent, and you’ll have up to 6 weeks to provide your SSN.If you fail to provide your SSN within this period, restrictions will be placed on transacting with your USD account, wallet, and USD card. Other actions on the Raenest app will not be restricted.       This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsBank AccountsCreating Your Bank Account on Raenest (formerly Geegpay).Creating Your Bank Account on Raenest (formerly Geegpay).How to Create a Raenest Personal Account Updated over 3 months agoManaging money across borders can be challenging — whether you’re getting paid by international clients, sending money home, or looking for a simple way to bank while abroad. That’s why we built Raenest: a platform designed to make global payments simple, secure, and accessible to everyone. With a Raenest personal account, you can open a USD, GBP, and EUR bank account from anywhere, create local accounts in your country of origin, get a USD card, send and receive money across borders, pay bills, explore investment opportunities, and do so much more. Raenest is for: Freelancers working with international clients. People with a full-time job who need reliable global banking. Creators earning from platforms and audiences worldwide. Solopreneurs running independent businesses. Independent contractors taking on cross-border work. People supported by friends and family abroad. Anyone who needs a convenient and affordable way to receive, spend, send, invest, and manage money globally​Here’s how to set up your personal account in just a few minutes. Step 1: Download the Raenest AppGet the Raenest app from the App Store or Google Play Store. Step 2: Select Personal AccountWhen prompted, choose Personal Account. Step 3: Register and Secure Your AccountEnter your email address and verify it. Create a secure password. Read and accept the U.S. Patriot Act.Step 4: Choose What You Want to Do with RaenestSelect how you’d like to start:Open a US bank account Get a USD card Send money abroad Invest in stocksOnce you’ve chosen, you’ll be taken to your dashboard, where you can see everything you can do with Raenest. Step 5: Verify Your Identity (KYC)To fully unlock your account, you’ll need to complete verification:On your dashboard, tap Verify Now Fill out your personal profile (name, phone number, date of birth) Verify your home address Verify your phone number For Nigerian users, add and verify your BVN Complete your ID verification Step 6: Start Using Your AccountOnce your verification is approved, you can:Create your bank accounts. For users whose country of residence is Nigeria, an NGN bank account will be created automatically once your ID verification is approved. Create physical and virtual USD cards for global spending.Access your dashboard tools. Start managing your global payments effortlessly​​  Related ArticlesRaenest (Formerly Geegpay) Personal AccountRaenest Dollar Card FAQRaenest Personal Account (Non- US Residents)How to Create a Raenest Personal Bank Account in the US.How to Open a USD, GBP, or EUR Personal Bank Account on Raenest (Non-US).Did this answer your question?😞😐😃

      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsBank AccountsReceiving International Payments with RaenestReceiving International Payments with RaenestHow to receive international payment with your Raenest virtual account Updated over 5 months agoRaenest offers a convenient and efficient way to receive international payments, making it easier for freelancers, businesses, and individuals to conduct global transactions. Here's a step-by-step guide with additional details to help you make the most of Raenest's international payment features: Step 1: Log In to the Raenest AppOpen the Raenest app on your mobile device and log in using your registered email address and password. Make sure you are using the official Raenest app to ensure the security of your transactions. Step 2: Access Your Account InformationAfter logging in, navigate to your account information. You can find this in the “Accounts" section of the app. Step 3: Copy Your Account DetailsIn the accounts section, locate and copy the following details:Account Number: This is your unique virtual account numberRouting Number: Copy the routing number associated with your Raenest account. This is essential for certain types of international transfers.Billing Address: Some international payment systems require your billing address for verification purposes. Copy the billing address associated with your Raenest account.Step 4: Share Your Account DetailsOnce you have copied your account number, routing number), and billing address, you can easily share these details with the individual or organization that will be sending you the international payment. You can share these details via email, messaging apps, or any other preferred communication method. Step 5: Receive International PaymentsRaenest supports various major currencies, making it accessible to users worldwide. Once your payee has the necessary information, they can initiate the international payment process using their preferred payment method or platform. Raenest accepts various international payment methods, such as wire transfers, ACH transfers, and more. Step 6: Confirm Receipt of PaymentOnce the international payment is sent, Raenest will process the transaction. You will receive a notification once the payment is credited to your Raenest account. You can also check your transaction history to verify the receipt of the payment.Related ArticlesVerifying Your Raenest (Formerly Geegpay) Account: Step-by-Step GuideAdding Funds to Your Raenest WalletCreating Your Bank Account on Raenest (formerly Geegpay).Funding Your Virtual Card on RaenestRaenest Dollar Card FAQDid this answer your question?😞😐😃

Updated over 5 months agoTable of contentsWhen signing up as a freelancer on Raenest, we ask for details about your source of income to help verify your employment and ensure compliance with financial regulations. If you’ve selected freelancer as your employment type and Upwork as your earnings platform, we’ll request your Upwork Certificate of Earnings as proof. Why do we need this?Unlike traditional employees who receive pay stubs or employment letters, freelancers often earn from multiple clients, making income verification more complex.       This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsRaenest Fast TrackGetting Paid Faster with Raenest FastTrackGetting Paid Faster with Raenest FastTrack Updated over 3 months agoTable of contents Waiting for Upwork payments to clear can sometimes slow things down, especially when you need quick access to your earnings. Raenest FastTrack is here to change that. With FastTrack, eligible Raenest users can receive their Upwork payments in less than an hour, instead of waiting the usual 24+ business hours. This feature gives freelancers and independent contractors faster access to their earnings, so they can focus on their work without worrying about delays. How Raenest FastTrack Works.Once your Upwork account is connected to your Raenest profile, any withdrawal you make from that connected account will be delivered to your Raenest balance in under an hour — quickly and securely. It’s the same smooth withdrawal process you’re used to, just much faster. Eligibility RequirementsTo qualify for FastTrack, you must:Have a verified Raenest account in good standing.​Successfully connect your Upwork account to Raenest.​Have a consistent Upwork transaction history showing legitimate, completed work.​Comply with all Raenest and Upwork terms of service.How to Connect Your Upwork AccountOn MobileLog in to the Raenest app.​Tap your profile avatar (top left).​Select Connected Apps.​Tap Upwork and follow the prompts.​Log in using your Upwork email and password to complete the connection.Once your connection status shows Connected, any withdrawal you make from the linked Upwork account will be received in less than an hour to the Raenest bank account on your profile. FastTrack Withdrawal LimitsThe maximum eligible amount for Raenest FastTrack is:Up to $1,500 (USD) on weekdays (Monday to Friday).​Up to $500 (USD) on weekends (Saturday and Sunday).Withdrawals exceeding these limits will be processed as regular Upwork payments, which typically comes in within 24 hours.Related ArticlesRaenest (Formerly Geegpay) Personal AccountVirtual Card Charges on RaenestRaenest Dollar Card FAQTroubleshooting Upwork Connection Issues for Raenest FastTrackInvesting in U.S. Stocks on Raenest.Did this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

In most cases, connection errors occur when you’ve signed in to Upwork using Google Single Sign-On (SSO) instead of your email and password. FastTrack requires a standard email login to link your account successfully. How to Fix a Failed Upwork ConnectionFollow these steps to switch from Google SSO to email and password login:Log in to your Upwork account.​Click your avatar (top-right corner).​Select Account Settings.​Go to Password & Security.​Under Login with Google, click Disconnect.​Set a new password and sign in again using your email and password.Once you’ve made this change, return to Raenest and reconnect your Upwork account:Go to Connected Apps in your Raenest app or web dashboard.​Click Upwork and follow the prompts to connect.​Once the status shows Connected, FastTrack will work as expected.How to Disconnect Upwork from RaenestIf you ever want to unlink your Upwork account from Raenest:Go to the Connected Apps page.​When your Upwork connection status shows Connected, click it.​Confirm Disconnect.After disconnecting, any future Upwork withdrawals will revert to the standard processing time (typically 24+ hours) instead of FastTrack’s instant access.Related ArticlesVerifying Your Raenest (Formerly Geegpay) Account: Step-by-Step GuideReceiving International Payments with RaenestRaenest Dollar Card FAQWhat Is an Upwork Certificate of Earnings and Why Do We Ask for It?Getting Paid Faster with Raenest FastTrackDid this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

Follow these simple steps to send money securely and efficiently within the Geegpay app: Step 1: Open the Raenest AppStart by opening the Raenest app on your mobile device. Log in using your registered email address and password. Ensure you are using the official Raenest app for a safe and reliable experience. Step 2: Click on the "Send Money" IconOn the app's dashboard, locate and tap on the "Send Money" icon. This will direct you to the money transfer section. Step 3: Select Transfer MethodIn the money transfer section, you'll be prompted to select a transfer method. Choose "Bank Transfer" as the preferred method for sending money. Step 4: Choose BeneficiarySelect the beneficiary (recipient) to whom you want to send money. Raenest allows you to add beneficiaries previously, simplifying the process for future transactions. Follow these step-by-step instructions to create your virtual card on Raenest: Step 1: Log In to Your Raenest AccountVisit the official Raenest website (www.geegpay.africa) and log in using your registered email address and password. Make sure you are accessing the official website to protect your account's security. Step 2: Access the "Cards" SectionOnce logged in, navigate to the "Cards" section on the Raenest dashboard. The "Cards" section allows you to manage your virtual cards and perform card-related activities. Step 3: Get a Virtual CardIn the "Cards" section, look for the "Get a Virtual Card" option and click on it. Step 4: Provide Card DetailsEnter your name as you want it to appear on the virtual card. Next, select the type of card you prefer, either Mastercard or Visa. You can also choose your preferred card colour to personalize it according to your style. Step 5: Click "Continue"After providing the necessary card details, click on the "Continue" button to proceed with the virtual card creation. title: Possible Reasons for Card Transaction Failure | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help Center
content:
Possible Reasons for Card Transaction Failure | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help CenterCopyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Poppins".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Copyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Lora".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsVirtual cardsPossible Reasons for Card Transaction FailurePossible Reasons for Card Transaction FailureWhy Your Raenest USD Virtual Card Transaction May Fail Updated over 5 months agoTable of contentsThere are several reasons why a card transaction might fail. Below are the most common ones and how to avoid them: 1. Insufficient FundsYour card must have enough balance to cover the transaction amount plus a $0.50 transaction fee. If your payment fails, check your balance and ensure you have enough funds before trying again. Note: If your card transaction fails four (4) times due to insufficient funds within 48 hours, your card will be temporarily frozen. You can unfreeze it using the app. However, if your payment fails two more times after unfreezing, your card may be permanently deactivated.​2. Incorrect Card DetailsIf the card number, expiration date, or CVV are entered incorrectly, the transaction will fail. Always double-check your details before proceeding. 3. Incorrect Billing AddressYou have two billing addresses associated with your Raenest USD virtual card:A U.S. billing addressYour home country billing addressYou can use either address to complete your payment, but make sure you're entering the correct postal code. You can find both addresses and the correct postal codes under Billing Address Info on the Cards page. For more details on billing addresses, check out our blog post here. 4. Daily or Monthly Spending Limits ReachedIf you've hit your daily or monthly spending limit, your transaction will be declined. If you need an increased limit, please contact our support team. 5. Technical IssuesSometimes, technical issues with the merchant's system, payment network, or the card provider can cause a transaction to fail. If this happens, try again later or contact support. 6. Restricted WebsitesYour Raenest USD virtual card cannot be used for transactions related to:  ❌ Gambling  ❌ Money send  ❌ Adult content If the transaction falls under a restricted category, it will be automatically declined. 7. Restricted CountriesTransactions may be declined in the following countries due to restrictions: Transactions may be declined in certain countries, including Belarus, Crimea, Cuba, Iran, Cyprus, Lebanon, North Korea, Libya, Myanmar, Russia, Syria, Venezuela, and Zimbabwe. If your transaction fails and you’re unsure why, check your balance, billing address, and card details first. If the issue persists, our support team is happy to assist. title: Raenest Dollar Card FAQ | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help Center
content:
Raenest Dollar Card FAQ | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help CenterCopyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Poppins".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Copyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Lora".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsVirtual cardsRaenest Dollar Card FAQRaenest Dollar Card FAQThis FAQ provides information about the card, including how to create and use it. It covers questions related to fees, security, and limits. Updated over 5 months agoTable of contentsGeneral InformationQ: What is the Raenest Dollar Card? A: The Raenest Dollar Card is a virtual card that allows you to make online purchases in US dollars. It is designed to facilitate seamless international transactions. Q: How can I get a Raenest Dollar Card? A: You can easily get a Raenest Dollar Card by signing up on the Raenest platform, verifying your account, and creating the card through the dashboard or mobile app. Q: What brand of card will I be getting? A: You will be getting a Mastercard. Q: What are the benefits of using the Raenest Dollar Card? A: The Raenest Dollar Card offers benefits such as competitive exchange rates, easy online payments, and security for online transactions. Getting StartedQ: Is there a fee for issuing the Raenest Dollar Card? A: Yes, there is a one-time fee of $3 for issuing the Raenest Dollar Card. Please check the latest fee structure on the Raenest website or app for any updates. Q: Is there a charge for funding the Raenest Dollar Card?A: Yes, there is a funding fee of $0.5 per funding transaction.​​Q: Is there a monthly maintenance fee for the Raenest Dollar Card?A: No, there is no monthly maintenance fee. Q: Is there a transaction fee?A: Yes, there is a $0.50 transaction fee per transaction. Q: How do I fund my Raenest Dollar Card? A: You can fund your Raenest Dollar Card by transferring funds from your Raenest wallet. Simply log in to your account, go to the card section, and choose the funding option. Q: Can I fund my card with currencies other than USD, such as NGN, GBP, and EUR? A: Yes, you can fund your Raenest Dollar Card with NGN (Nigerian Naira), GBP (British Pounds) and EUR (European Euro). Q: How many cards can I create?A: You can only have one active card at a time. UsageQ: Where can I use my Raenest Dollar Card? A: The Raenest Dollar Card can be used for online purchases anywhere Mastercard is accepted. Q: Are there any spending limits on the Raenest Dollar Card? A: Yes, there are spending limits based on your account verification level. Please check your account settings for specific limits. Q: Can I use the Raenest Dollar Card for subscriptions and recurring payments? A: Yes, you can use your Raenest Dollar Card for subscriptions and recurring payments. Q: Can I use the Raenest Dollar Card to receive payments? A: Yes, you can use your Raenest Dollar Card to receive payments on selected platforms such as Stripe, Upwork, Fiverr, Brex, and Deel. Q: Can I withdraw from the Raenest Dollar Card? A: Yes, you can withdraw from your Raenest Dollar Card. However, to keep the card active for future use, a minimum balance of $1 is required. Q: How do I find my billing address on the app? A: Open the Geegpay app, tap on "Cards," then tap on "Billing Address." Copy & paste your details to any desired platform. Q: Can I use the card for contactless payments? A: Yes, you can add the Raenest Dollar USD Card to your Apple Pay and Google Pay wallets and use it for contactless payments when shopping in-person from local shops abroad. Q: Can my card balance become negative?A: Yes, your card balance can become negative if a transaction is force-posted to your account when there are insufficient funds to cover the expense. This occurs when the transaction amount exceeds your available balance. In such cases, we may debit the balance of your other cards or your USD wallet to cover the deficit. SecurityQ: How secure is the Raenest Dollar Card? A: The Raenest Dollar Card is a 3Ds highly secure, utilizing advanced encryption and fraud detection measures to protect your transactions and personal information. Q: What should I do if my card details are compromised? A: If your card details are compromised, immediately freeze your card through the Raenest app and contact customer support for assistance. Managing Your CardQ: How do I check my card balance and transaction history? A: You can check your card balance and transaction history by logging into your Raenest account and navigating to the card section. Q: Can I temporarily freeze or unfreeze my Raenest Dollar Card? A: Yes, you can temporarily freeze or unfreeze your Raenest Dollar Card through the Raenest app. Q: How do I terminate my Raenest Dollar Card? A: To terminate your Raenest Dollar Card, visit the card section and scroll to 'Terminate Card'. SupportQ: How do I contact Raenest customer support? A: You can contact Raenest customer support through the in-app chat feature, via email, or by visiting the support section on the Raenest website. Q: What should I do if I encounter a problem with my Raenest Dollar Card? A: If you encounter any issues with your Raenest Dollar Card, please contact customer support for prompt assistance. Fees and ChargesQ: What are the fees associated with using the Raenest Dollar Card? A: Fees may include card issuance fees, transaction fees, and cross-border fees. Please refer to the Raenest card fee page for detailed information. Q: What are cross-border fees about? A: Mastercard charges a cross-border processing fee when you use your card on non-US websites. A charge of 0.9% - the industry standard, is made for USD transactions on non-US websites. Q: Are there any hidden charges? A: Raenest is transparent about its fees. All applicable charges are listed on the card fee page. For any additional questions or support, please feel free to reach out to us through the Raenest app or website. We are here to help you make the most of your Raenest Dollar Card.Related ArticlesVirtual Card Charges on RaenestPossible Reasons for Card Transaction FailureFunding Your Virtual Card on RaenestUsing Your Raenest Virtual CardConversion Fees on RaenestDid this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

This offer is limited to the first 1,000 users, so it’s fastest fingers first. Who can participate?New Raenest users who create a virtual dollar cardExisting users who already have or use their virtual cardIf you have a funded Raenest virtual dollar card, you’re automatically eligible. How do I qualify for the $2 cashback?To qualify:Use your Raenest Virtual Dollar Card between 25th - 30th November 2025​Spend a total of $200 (or more) during the campaign window​Be among the first 1,000 users to reach the $200 spend thresholdWhere can I use my Raenest Virtual Dollar Card?Anywhere that accepts virtual dollar cards, including:AppleTikTokNamecheapUpworkPayPalOpenAIShopifyUdemyGooglePlus thousands of global stores running Black Friday dealsYou can shop, subscribe, book flights, pay for courses, ads, tools, and a lot more. Can I add my Raenest Virtual Dollar Card to Apple Pay or Google Pay?Yes, absolutely.Apple Pay - for seamless tap-to-pay payments and online purchase on Apple devicesGoogle Pay - for tap-to-pay and online checkout on AndroidThis makes shopping faster and more secure during the Black Friday rush. How do I create a Raenest Virtual Dollar Card?Open your Raenest app​Go to Cards​Tap Create Virtual Dollar Card​Fund any of your wallet and pay for $3 to create your card​Fund your card with at least $2​Start using your card instantlyNeed a video walkthrough, click here. Do I need to spend the $200 in one transaction?No. Your total spend across multiple transactions counts, as long as it all happens within the campaign period. For example:$50 + $80 + $70 = $200 → qualifies How will I know if I’m among the first 1,000 users?We’ll validate all transactions after the campaign ends. If you’re eligible, you’ll receive your cashback after verification. When will I receive my cashback?Cashbacks will be processed right after the campaign, once all qualifying transactions are confirmed. We’ll notify you when your cashback is added. When will I receive my cashback?Cashbacks will be processed during and after the campaign, once all qualifying transactions are confirmed. We’ll notify you when your cashback is added. What happens if I spend $200 after the first 1,000 users?You can still use your card normally, but you won’t receive the cashback once the cap is reached. Do refunded or reversed transactions count?No, only successful, completed payments count toward the $200 threshold. What if my card gets declined?Make sure:You have enough balance in your wallet​Your card details are correct​The merchant accepts virtual dollar cards​You’re not exceeding your limitsIf it still doesn’t work, contact Support through the in-app chat. What is my spending limit during Black Friday?Your spending limit depends on your Raenest KYC level. Here’s the full breakdown:KYC Level 1Daily limit: $7,000Monthly limit: $21,000KYC Level 2Daily limit: $10,000Monthly limit: $25,000KYC Level 3Daily limit: $12,000Monthly limit: $36,000KYC Level 4Daily limit: $15,000Monthly limit: $45,000KYC Level 5Daily limit: $20,000Monthly limit: $60,000Can I participate if I create my card after the campaign starts?Yes. New users can create a card anytime during the campaign, just make sure you:Create your card​Fund it Spend your $200 before 11:59pm 30th November​Beat the rush (remember: only the first 1,000 users qualify)Why didn’t I get my cashback?You may not receive cashback if:You weren’t among the first 1,000 users​You didn’t reach $200 total spend​Your transactions were reversed/refunded​You used a different payment method​You spent outside 25th - 30th NovemberIf you still think there’s an issue, reach out to Support with your transaction IDs. Need help?If you have any questions or need assistance with your card or transactions, reach out via the in-app or website support chat. Our team is ready to assist throughout the campaign.Related ArticlesRaenest (Formerly Geegpay) Personal AccountVirtual Card Charges on RaenestCreating Your Bank Account on Raenest (formerly Geegpay).Raenest Dollar Card FAQEverything You Need to Know About Stablecoins on Raenest.Did this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsWallets & CurrenciesIntroducing Rewards: All You Need To KnowIntroducing Rewards: All You Need To KnowRewards lets you earn monthly rewards based on your USD wallet activity and account standing. Updated over 5 months agoTable of contents We’re excited to launch Rewards, our new program that lets you earn rewards simply by using your account! Here’s everything you need to know about eligibility and how rewards work.1. What is Rewards?Rewards is designed to give back to active users. Each month, eligible users can earn rewards based on their activity within their USD wallet. 2. Why is Raenest Giving Rewards?Recently, we’ve built stronger banking and technology partnerships that have helped reduce some of our costs significantly, thanks to your ongoing transactions and support. Our mission is to be the trusted financial platform for Africans, offering tools to manage your money anytime, anywhere. In line with this mission, Rewards lets us give back to you—our way of saying thank you for being a part of our journey. 3. How Does It Work?To qualify for Rewards, here are some key factors we consider:Eligible Balance: Only funds in your USD wallet are eligible; funds on your card balance don’t count toward rewards.Monthly Activity: Rewards are influenced by both your transaction volume and fees paid in the previous month.Average Balance: Your average USD balance must be a minimum of 100 USD in the previous month. This may also influence your reward amount.4. How Are Rewards Calculated?We calculate rewards based on the following activities:Receive Money: Funds deposited directly into your USD account.Spend with USD Card: Purchases made using your USD card.Convert Funds: Currency conversions from your USD wallet to other currencies.Average Balance: Your average USD wallet balance also affect your rewards, with higher balances and activity potentially leading to increased rewards.5. Conditions for Receiving RewardsAccount Status: Your account must be in good standing, with no restrictions or active investigations.Reward Credit Date: Rewards will be credited to your Reward wallet on or before the 10th of the following month.6. Tips for Maximising RewardsStay Active: Regular transactions (receiving, spending, and converting funds) can positively impact your rewards.Maintain Good Account Standing: Keeping your account unrestricted is essential to qualify for rewards. See our Terms of Service page.Claiming your Reward: You can claim your reward at any time once it’s up to $2. Simply go to the Rewards page and tap ‘claim reward’ to move it to your USD Wallet.7. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)Q1: Do funds in my card balance count toward rewards?A: No, only funds in your USD wallet are eligible. Q2: When will I receive my rewards?A: Rewards will be credited to your Reward wallet on or before the 10th of the following month. Q3: Can my reward amount vary each month?A: Yes, rewards vary based on your account activity, transaction volume, and average USD balance. Q4: What types of transactions contribute to my rewards?A: Receiving money in your USD account, spending with your USD card, and converting from your USD wallet all contribute.With Rewards, your account activity works for you! If you have further questions, feel free to contact our support team.Related ArticlesEverything You Need to Know About Stablecoins on Raenest.Raenest 2025 Black Friday Cashback Campaign: Everything You Need to KnowDid this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsFunding Your WalletAdding Funds to Your Raenest Naira (NGN) WalletAdding Funds to Your Raenest Naira (NGN) WalletFunding your Raenest NGN wallet for your transactions Updated over 5 months agoFunding your Raenest wallet is a quick and simple process that allows you to add money to your account for seamless transactions. Follow these step-by-step instructions to fund your Raenest wallet: Step 1: Log In to Your Raenest AppOpen the Raenest app on your mobile device and log in using your registered email address and password. Ensure that you have downloaded the official Raenest app from a trusted source to maintain security. Step 2: Select Your Naira WalletUpon logging in, navigate to your Raenest dashboard and select your Naira wallet. At the moment, funding can only be done with your Naira wallet. Step 3: Click on "Add Money"Look for the "Add Money" option in your Naira wallet section and click on it. By selecting this option, you are ready to initiate the funding process. Step 4: View Account DetailsRaenest will display the account details of all the available wallets linked to your account. These details include the account number and other relevant information. Step 5: Make the TransferCopy the account number of the specific wallet you want to top up (in this case, your Naira wallet) and paste it into your banking app or mobile banking platform. Step 6: Complete the TransferIn your banking app, enter the amount you wish to add to your Raenest wallet and proceed with the transfer. Ensure that you double-check the account number to avoid any errors. Step 7: Wait for ConfirmationAfter making the transfer, allow some time for the transaction to process. Raenest will send you a confirmation notification once the funds are successfully added to your Naira wallet.Related ArticlesAdding Funds to Your Raenest WalletSending Money on RaenestFunding Your Virtual Card on RaenestCurrency Conversion in Raenest: Convert USD to NGNAbout Your NGN Account.Did this answer your question?😞😐😃

Resetting Your Password (Forgot Password)If you can’t remember your password, follow these steps to get back into your account:On the Login screen, tap Forgot Password.Enter your email address to request a reset.A security code will be sent to your email.Enter the code in the app to confirm your identity.You’ll be prompted to choose a new password and confirm it.Once updated, log in again using your email address and new password.Changing Your Password for Security ReasonsYou don’t need to wait until you forget your password, you can also change it anytime for extra security. title: Enabling 2FA for Extra Security | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help Center
content:
Enabling 2FA for Extra Security | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help CenterCopyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Poppins".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Copyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Lora".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsSecuring your AccountEnabling 2FA for Extra SecurityEnabling 2FA for Extra Security Updated over 5 months agoTable of contentsEnabling two-factor authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security to your account, making it more resilient against unauthorised access. 2FA requires a second form of verification, usually a one-time code, in addition to your regular password. Follow these steps to enable 2FA on your account: Step 1: Log in to the AppOpen the Raenest app on your mobile device and log in using your registered email address and password. Step 2: Go to Your ProfileAfter logging in, navigate to your profile or account settings, where you’ll find your personal information and account preferences. Step 3: Access Security SettingsWithin your profile settings, locate and tap the Security option. This is where you can manage your account’s security features. Step 4: Enable Two-Factor AuthenticationIn the Security section, find the Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) option. Tap to enable 2FA for your account. Step 5: Activate 2FAYou’ll be prompted to activate 2FA. Tap Activate 2FA to start the setup process. Step 6: Download an Authenticator AppYou’ll see a QR code on your screen. Download an authenticator app such as Google Authenticator or Authy from your device’s app store. Step 7: Scan the Barcode and Enter the One-Time CodeOpen your authenticator app and scan the QR code displayed on the Raenest app (or enter the setup key manually). The app will then generate a one-time code for your account. Step 8: Save Your Recovery CodeAfter setup, your authenticator app will display a recovery code. This code is important — keep it in a safe place. You’ll need it if you ever lose access to your authenticator app or need to reset your 2FA. Step 9: Submit and VerifyEnter the one-time code generated by the authenticator app into the Raenest app and tap Submit to complete the process. Logging into Your Raenest Account with 2FAOnce 2FA is enabled, you’ll use it every time you log in. This helps confirm it’s really you accessing your account. Here’s how it works:Open the Raenest app and enter your email address and password as usual.You’ll be prompted to enter a verification code.Open your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator or Authy).Find the code associated with your Raenest account.Enter the code in the Raenest app and tap Confirm.That’s it! Once the code is verified, you’ll be logged in securely. Note that: Your 2FA code refreshes every 30 seconds, so make sure to enter it before it expires. If it changes while you’re typing, simply use the latest code displayed in your authenticator app.Related ArticlesSending Money on RaenestCreating Your Bank Account on Raenest (formerly Geegpay).How to Reset Your 2FA on Raenest.How to set up and verify your Raenest account in IndiaHow to set up and verify your Raenest account in the PhilippinesDid this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

Updated over 5 months agoTable of contentsTwo-Factor Authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring more than just your password when logging in. If you lose access to your authenticator app or recovery code, you’ll need to reset your 2FA. The process is simple and can be done right from the login screen. Steps to reset your 2FAWhen logging in, you’ll be asked to enter your 2FA recovery code.If you have the recovery code that was provided when you first set up your authenticator app:Enter itTap ConfirmOnce you the recovery code is confirmed:We’ll send a verification code to your registered phone number to help you reset your 2FAEnter the code and tap ConfirmYou can also choose to receive the code via WhatsApp:Select Receive code by WhatsAppWe’ll send the verification code to your WhatsApp numberEnter the code and tap ConfirmOnce you’ve confirmed your identity, your old 2FA setup will be removed. You’ll then be able to log in with your password only. The next time you access your account, you’ll be prompted to set up 2FA again with your authenticator app to keep your account secure. However, if you don’t have your 2FA recovery code:Tap I don’t have the recovery codeYou’ll be prompted to reach out to our support team. Tap the button to speak with a team member, and they’ll guide you through the steps to get back into your account.Related ArticlesEnabling 2FA for Extra SecurityHow to Reset or Change Your Password on Raenest.Investing in U.S. Stocks on Raenest.How to set up and verify your Raenest account in IndiaHow to set up and verify your Raenest account in the PhilippinesDid this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

Bank Accounts Deposit Charges on Raenest | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help CenterCopyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Poppins".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Copyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Lora".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsFees and ChargesBank Accounts Deposit Charges on RaenestBank Accounts Deposit Charges on RaenestDetails about our bank accounts fee Updated over 2 weeks agoAt Raenest, we believe receiving money should be simple and affordable. That’s why we’ve kept our fees competitive and transparent. Here's everything you need to know about the charges for receiving funds in your accounts, depending on the currency, with estimated delivery times included:CurrencyFeeDescriptionEstimated Delivery TimeUSD (ACH)You get 1 free ACH deposit every month. After that, each ACH deposit is $1 flat for any amount.It can only be used to receive payments from the US through ACHSame day - two business days.USD(Domestic Wire)$10 flat for any amount.It can only be used to receive payments from the US through Local Wire transfer.​Same day - two business days.​Stablecoins(USDT and USDC)You get 1 free stablecoin deposit every month. After that, each Stablecoins deposit is $1 flat for any amount.​It can only be used to receive payments via Ethereum, Binance (BNB Smart Chain), Polygon, Tron, and Solana, with instant 1:1 conversion to USD.​Usually instant to 5 minutes.​USD(SWIFT)The amount received depends on the SWIFT fee method used by the sender (SHA, BEN, or OUR).​$16 flat for any amount.​It can be used to receive USD from over 190 countries via the SWIFT network.​1 to 5 business days.​EUR0.8% (minimum €1.50, maximum €10).It can only be used to receive payments from countries within the EEA region.5 minutes to 1 business day.GBP0.8% (minimum £1.50, maximum £10)​It can only be used to receive payments from the UK.5 minutes to 1 day.NGNNOOnly for Nigeria's local transfer​InstantSWIFT FEE OPTIONSThere are three fee options available: shared (SHA), beneficiary (BEN), and sender (OUR). The sender's fee choice will impact the final amount deposited into your bank account.Sender Covers Fees (OUR): The sender is responsible for all transfer fees. The full amount is delivered to the beneficiary.Beneficiary Covers Fees (BEN): The beneficiary is responsible for the transfer fees. Fees are deducted from the transfer amount, and the beneficiary receives the net amount.Shared Fees (SHA): The sender covers fees from the sending bank, while any fees from intermediary banks are deducted from the transfer. The beneficiary receives the net amount after these deductions.We’re committed to keeping your global payments seamless and cost-effective. If you have any questions about these fees or how to receive payments, send a message to our support team via the live chat in the app. Related ArticlesVirtual Card Charges on RaenestSending Money on RaenestOur Supported Countries, Currency, and Transfer FeesRaenest Dollar Card FAQAbout Your USD Account.Did this answer your question?😞😐😃

      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsFees and ChargesConversion Fees on RaenestConversion Fees on RaenestThis article explains how conversion fees work on Raenest, including when they apply, how much you can be charged, and how fees are capped. Updated over a month agoTable of contentsWhat Is a Conversion Fee?A conversion fee is charged when you convert money from one currency to another on Raenest (for example, USD to NGN, GBP to KES, NGN to KES). How Conversion Fees WorkConversion fees apply across all supported currency corridors on Raenest.To keep pricing fair and predictable, conversion fees are capped. This means:You will never be charged more than the cap, no matter how much you convert.The conversion fee is transparent and always shown before you confirm the conversion.When Are Conversion Fees Charged?You’ll be charged a conversion fee when you:Convert between foreign currencies (e.g. USD → GBP)Convert foreign currency to local currency (e.g. USD → NGN, GBP → KES)Convert between local currencies (e.g. NGN → KES, GHS → KES)When Conversion Fees Do Not ApplyConversion fees do not apply if:Sending money in the same currencyReceiving funds without converting themConversion from local currencies to foreign currencies (e.g. NGN → USD, KES → GBP)Why Are Conversion Fees Capped?Capped fees ensure:Predictable and transparent costs for usersFair pricing for both small and large conversionsNo unexpected charges on high-value transactionsThe cap guarantees that even as your transaction size increases, your conversion fee stays controlled. Where Can I See the Fee?Before completing any conversion:The exact conversion fee is displayed on the confirmation screenYou can review and cancel before proceedingConversion Fee Rates (By Corridor)Foreign Currency → Local CurrencyConversion CorridorConversion FeeUSD → NGN0.5%, capped at 2.7 USDGBP → NGN0.5%, capped at 2.7 GBPEUR → NGN0.5%, capped at 2.7 EURUSD → KES0.7%, capped at 2.7 USDGBP → KES0.75%, capped at 2.7 GBPEUR → KES0.75%, capped at 2.7 EURUSD → GHS0.7%, capped at 2.7 USDGBP → GHS0.75%, capped at 2.7 GBPEUR → GHS0.75%, capped at 2.7 EURUSD → PHP0.6%, capped at 6 USDGBP → PHP0.6%, capped at 6 GBPEUR → PHP0.6%, capped at 6 EURUSD → INR0.6%, capped at 6 USDGBP → INR0.6%, capped at 6 GBPEUR → INR0.6%, capped at 6 EUROther Conversion CorridorsConversion CorridorConversion FeeForeign Currency → Foreign Currency (e.g. USD → GBP)0.4%, capped at 30 USD/GBP/EURForeign Currency → Local Currency (e.g. USD → EGP, GBP → RWF)0.9%, capped at 6 USD/GBP/EURLocal Currency → Local Currency (e.g. NGN → KES)1%, capped at 5000 of originating currencyMinimum FeeThe minimum conversion fee for all corridor is 0.25 USD/GBP/EUR. Need Help?If you have questions about a specific conversion or fee, please contact support via the Raenest app or Help Centre.Related ArticlesBank Accounts Deposit Charges on RaenestOur Supported Countries, Currency, and Transfer FeesRaenest Dollar Card FAQRaenest Referral Program Help GuideInvesting in U.S. Stocks on Raenest.Did this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

Updated over 5 months agoTable of contents Pay for essential services like airtime, data, electricity, and TV subscriptions directly from your Raenest app, using any of your wallets (USD, GBP, EUR, or NGN). Raenest users in Nigeria can now access discounts on airtime and internet purchases. While all bill types are available, discounts currently apply to only airtime and data payments. Just choose your service, and you’ll see any applicable discount before you pay.​Here’s everything you need to know:1. What is Bills Payment?Raenest's Bills Payment lets you conveniently pay for everyday essentials like airtime, internet, electricity, and cable TV all from your Geegpay app.2. Who Can Use It?This feature is currently available to Raenest users in Nigeria.3. What Services Can I Pay For?Here’s a list of supported billers by category:CategoryBillerAirtimeMTN, Airtel, GLO, 9mobileDataMTN, Airtel, GLO, 9mobile, SmileCable TVGOtv, DStvElectricityAEDC, BEDC, EEDC, IBEDC, EKEDC, IKEDC, JEDC, PHEDC, KAEDC, KEDCO, YEDC, APLEDC, Aba, Benin, Enugu, Eko, Ibadan, Ikeja, Jos, Kaduna, Kano4. What Discounts Are Available?We offer instant discounts for airtime and internet bill categories. The exact percentage varies by service provider, and you’ll be able to see the discount clearly displayed in the app before you complete any transaction.  Airtime & DataMTN & Airtel: 3%GLO: 5%9mobile: 4%5. Are There Any Fees?No. Raenest doesn’t charge any fees for bills payment.6. How Do I Pay?Simply log into your Geegpay app Select Pay BillsChoose the bill you want to payPay from any wallet USD, GBP, EUR, or NGN7. What Are the Limits?Maximum Per Transaction:Airtime/Data: ₦50,000Electricity: No limit Minimum Amounts:Airtime: ₦200Data: ₦100Electricity: ₦1,000Cable TV: Based on the bouquet8. How Fast Are Payments?All bills payment are processed instantly. Prepaid electricity tokens are shown immediately and saved in your transaction history.9. What If My Payment Fails?Double-check that your wallet was debited.Verify recipient details like meter number or smartcard ID.If you still have issues, contact Raenest Support via the mobile application or web chat.10. When Will the Discount End?There’s no expiry date yet. If anything changes, we’ll let you know ahead of time. With Bills Payment, you can handle everything in one place and enjoy discounts on airtime and internet payments. If you have further questions, feel free to contact our support team via the live chat in the app.  Related ArticlesReceiving International Payments with RaenestRaenest Dollar Card FAQRaenest PerksFrequently Asked Questions – Raenest PerksUnderstanding Payment Links and Fees on RaenestDid this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

Updated over 5 months agoTable of contents With Raenest Perks, all Raenest users now have access to exclusive discounts and bonuses across lifestyle, business, health, tech, educational services, migration services, delivery services and more. From saving money on everyday essentials to accessing tools that power your life and career, your Raenest account now gives you much more than just global payments. What is Raenest Perks?Raenest Perks is a growing list of partner offers and discounts curated to support your life and work as a global professional. title: Everything You Need to Know About Stablecoins on Raenest. | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help Center
content:
Everything You Need to Know About Stablecoins on Raenest. | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help CenterCopyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Poppins".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Copyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Lora".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsStablecoins on RaenestEverything You Need to Know About Stablecoins on Raenest.Everything You Need to Know About Stablecoins on Raenest. Updated over 5 months agoTable of contentsStablecoins are now available on Raenest, making it easier than ever to receive money from clients, partners, and family abroad who prefer paying with crypto. With Raenest, you can receive USDT and USDC, and the funds are instantly converted into U.S. Dollars (USD) in your Raenest account, no need to worry about volatility or managing crypto wallets. This guide explains everything you need to know about how stablecoins work on Raenest. What are Stablecoins?Stablecoins are cryptocurrencies designed to maintain a steady value by being tied (“pegged”) to a stable asset like the U.S. Dollar.1 USDC ≈ 1 USD1 USDT ≈ 1 USDThey’re widely used for sending and receiving money internationally because they’re faster and more stable than most cryptocurrencies. How Stablecoins work on RaenestOn Raenest, stablecoins act as a receivable method.When someone sends USDT or USDC to your stablecoin wallet address, the funds are automatically converted to USD using the exchange rate at the time of the transaction.The converted funds are then credited to your Raenest USD account.From there, you can spend, withdraw, or transfer like any other balance in your Raenest account.Note: You cannot withdraw or store stablecoins on Raenest. Once received, they are immediately converted into USD and credited to your wallet. How to create a Stablecoin WalletYou’ll need a stablecoin wallet address to start receiving payments. There are two ways this works depending on your account status:If you don’t already have a USD, GBP, or EUR bank account on Raenest: Go to Accounts in the app.Select “Get Account.”You’ll be asked to fill a short questionnaire with details about you and your work (this is the same process as opening a bank account).Once submitted, your request will either:Be approved immediately, orGo under review (depending on your responses and history).Once approved, your USDC and USDT wallet addresses will be created.​If you already have a Raenest bank account (USD, GBP, or EUR):​Go to Accounts and select “Create Stablecoin Wallet.”You’ll review and accept the Terms & Conditions.Your stablecoin wallet is created. Depending on the system check, it may be:Approved immediately, orSent under review if there are questionable past transactions.Each stablecoin wallet gives you both a USDC address and a USDT address, and each comes with a sub-wallet for different networks (Ethereum, Tron, etc.), so you can choose the one that works best for the sender. How to Receive StablecoinsOpen your Raenest app and go to Accounts.Copy your stablecoin wallet address (USDC or USDT).Share it with the sender.Once the payment is made:The stablecoins are instantly converted to USD at the current exchange rate.The USD balance is credited to your Raenest account.Transfers typically take 1 - 20 minutes to reflect, depending on the blockchain network (Ethereum, Tron, etc.) and network congestion. What are the conversion rates for USDC/USDT to USD?Stablecoin transactions are converted into USD at the prevailing exchange rate at the time of transaction.The rate is provided by Raenest’s payment partners and may differ slightly from other exchanges.All conversions are final — once USDC/USDT is received, it cannot be converted back to stablecoins.How can I spend or use the funds I receive?Once converted, your USD balance can be used like any other funds in Raenest:Withdraw to your local bank account.Spend using your Raenest card.Use it for cross-border payments.Are there transaction limits for receiving Stablecoins?Your transaction limits depend on your KYC (Know Your Customer) level.Higher verification levels mean higher limits.Suspicious or non-compliant inflows may be placed on hold for further checks before being released.Why Stablecoins on Raenest?With stablecoins on Raenest, you get the best of both worlds:Receive payments quickly from anywhere in the world.Avoid the volatility of crypto as your funds arrive as USD instantly.No need to manage separate crypto wallets.Compliant, secure, and simple to use.That’s all you need to know to get started with stablecoins on Raenest. Ready to get paid in stablecoins? Log in to the app and tap ‘Account’. title: Stock Investing. | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help Center
content:
Stock Investing. | Raenest (formerly Geegpay) Help CenterCopyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Poppins".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Copyright (c) 2023, Intercom, Inc. ([email protected]) with Reserved Font Name "Lora".
      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsU.S. StocksStock Investing.Stock Investing.A Beginner’s Guide to Stock Investing. Updated over 4 months agoTable of contents Stock investing is one of the best ways to grow your money over time. If you’re new to it, this guide will walk you through the basics, from what a stock actually is to how you can start investing right now with Raenest. What is a Stock?When you buy a stock, you’re buying a small piece of a company. Think of companies you already know, like Apple, Tesla, or Google. By owning a stock, you share in the company’s growth and success. If the company performs well, the value of your stock usually increases. If it performs poorly, the value may decrease. That’s why stocks are often described as ownership, because you actually own a fraction of the business. Why People Invest in StocksStocks are popular because they give your money a chance to grow faster than it would in a regular savings account. Instead of keeping cash idle, investing lets your money “work for you.” Over time, the stock market has historically grown in value, meaning investors who hold their stocks for the long term can benefit from this growth. How Stock Investing WorksThe process is simple:Buy – Choose the stock you want to invest in.Hold – Keep it as the company grows and the stock price changes.Sell – When you’re ready, sell your stock and take your profit (or cut your loss if needed).This simple buy-hold-sell cycle is the foundation of stock investing. The Stock Market ExplainedStocks are traded in markets, just like goods are traded in shops. The U.S. stock market is the largest and most active market. It’s open Monday to Friday, 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM (EST).The good news is that even if the market is closed, you can still place an order through Raenest, and it will be processed when the market opens. Getting Started: You Don’t Need a Lot of MoneyMany people think investing requires thousands of dollars, but that’s not true. With Raenest, you can start investing with as little as $2. Small, regular investments can grow significantly over time, thanks to compounding. The Power of CompoundingCompounding happens when you reinvest your earnings back into your investment. This way, your money doesn’t just grow, it grows on top of its own growth. Here’s an example:Let’s say you invest $600 in your first year (that’s $50 each month).Let’s say your investments grow by about 10% per year. End of Year 1: Your $600 grows by $60. You now have $660.​Year 2: Instead of starting with just $600 again, you now start with $660. That extra $60 stays invested and also earns returns. So 10% of $660 = $66. At the end of Year 2, you now have $726.Notice how your earnings grew from $60 in Year 1 to $66 in Year 2 — not because you added more money, but because your returns also started earning returns. That’s compounding in action. The more consistently you invest, the more your money has time to multiply. Meet Your Trading WalletBefore you can buy stocks, you’ll need to fund your Trading Wallet in the app. This wallet acts like your pocket for stock investments.When you buy stocks, the funds come from your Trading Wallet.When you sell stocks, the money goes back into your Trading Wallet.You can withdraw anytime from your Trading Wallet back into your Raenest account.Why Stock Prices ChangeStock prices move up and down all the time. This happens because of supply and demand. If more people want to buy a stock, the price rises. If more people want to sell, the price falls. That’s why the price you see when placing an order may change slightly by the time it’s completed. It’s part of the normal flow of the market. What You Can Buy: Stocks & ETFsInside Raenest, you can make two main types of investments:Stocks – Shares of individual companies like Amazon, Microsoft, or Netflix.ETFs (Exchange-Traded Funds) – A single investment that contains many different stocks.ETFs are especially useful for beginners because they spread your money across many companies at once and reduce risk.​What is an ETF?An ETF is like a basket of stocks. Instead of buying one company at a time, you can buy one ETF and instantly own a mix of different companies. For example, an ETF might include shares from 500 large U.S. companies. This way, if one company performs poorly, others in the basket may perform well and balance it out. ETFs are often seen as a simple way to diversify and are a great starting point for new investors. Understanding RiskIt’s important to know that investing comes with risk. Stock prices can go up or down, and returns are not guaranteed. Raenest shows you projections based on past performance, but past results don’t always predict the future. That said, investing consistently and holding for the long term often increases your chances of success. You’re Ready to StartNow that you understand the basics, you can begin your investing journey with confidence.With Raenest, you can:Open a trading account easily.Fund your Trading Wallet instantly from any of your multi-currency wallets.Start investing in U.S. stocks and ETFs.Log in to the app and tap ‘Stocks’ to get started. Important NoticeRaenest is not a broker-dealer, investment adviser, or financial institution. Raenest solely provides the technology platform that connects users to licensed brokerage partners for investment execution, custody, and settlement. Raenest stock investment service is powered by regulated third-party partners, including Alpaca Securities LLC (member FINRA/SIPC) and Citi Investment Capital Limited (a broker-dealer registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission, Nigeria)  Related ArticlesRaenest (Formerly Geegpay) Personal AccountAdding Funds to Your Raenest WalletAdding Funds to Your Raenest Naira (NGN) WalletWelcome to Nest — Your Space to Grow Wealth.Investing in U.S. Stocks on Raenest.Did this answer your question?😞😐😃Table of contents

      This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.Skip to main contentEnglishEnglishEnglishEnglishSearch for articles...All CollectionsU.S. StocksInvesting in U.S. Stocks on Raenest.Investing in U.S. Stocks on Raenest. Updated over 2 months agoTable of contents  Raenest Stocks lets you invest in U.S. stocks and ETFs directly from the Raenest app. You can buy, sell, and manage your investments, all in one place. The feature is built for both first-time investors and users already familiar with stock investing who want a simpler, faster alternative. Raenest provides the technology, while regulated third-party partners handle brokerage, custody, and trade execution. Who can use the Stocks feature?Any Raenest user who has completed identity verification can access the stocks feature. If your account is verified, you’re eligible to get started. Every Raenest Stocks user gets one commission-free buy or sell trade each month. Once you use it, standard trading fees apply to subsequent trades for that month.​How to access StocksYou can access Stocks in two ways:Tap Stocks on the bottom navigation barOr tap the Buy stocks quick actionThe first time you open Stocks, you’ll see a short welcome screen. After that, you’ll go straight to your portfolio.​Setting up your investment accountBefore you can start investing, you’ll need to complete a one-time investment setup. This is required by regulations and helps us create your brokerage account. You’ll be asked to provide:​Employment detailsOccupationEmployer (if applicable)Source of incomeMonthly income rangeLiquid assetsAffiliationsYou’ll need to confirm whether you:Work with or are affiliated with a U.S.-registered broker-dealer or FINRAAre a senior executive or own 10% or more of a publicly traded companyAgreementsYou’ll also need to review and agree to the investment terms and disclosures.​For U.S. usersYou’ll be asked to confirm your citizenship or residency status.Once completed, your brokerage account is created and you can start investing. Note: If you already provided employment details when creating a USD account, you won’t need to re-enter them. You’ll only complete the additional stock-related fields.​Understanding your Trading WalletYour Trading Wallet is a dedicated USD wallet used for stock investing.You fund it to buy stocksProceeds from sold stocks settle into itDividends are paid into itFunding your Trading WalletYou can fund your Trading Wallet from any Raenest balance:USDNGNGBPEURThe minimum funding amount: $2 Your trading wallet currency: USD FeesFunding from USD is freeFunding from other currencies may include a conversion feeBuying stocksHere’s how buying stocks works:Select a stock or ETFEnter the amount in USDChoose the wallet to pay fromReview estimated shares and feesConfirm your orderFractional sharesYou don’t need to buy a full share. If a stock costs $100 and you invest $10, you’ll own 0.1 shares. This makes it easier to start small and diversify.​Selling stocksTo sell a stock:Select the stock from your portfolioEnter an amount or tap Sell allReview the detailsConfirm the sale"Sell all" closes your position by selling all shares you own for that stock.​When are trades executed?Buy and sell orders are executed during U.S. market hours:9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET2:30 PM – 9:00 PM WAT (3:30 PM – 10:00 PM WAT during daylight savings)You can place orders outside market hours, but they’ll only execute when the market opens. The app shows whether the market is open or closed.​Withdrawals from the Trading WalletWhen you sell a stock:Funds go into your Trading Wallet immediatelyYou can use them to buy other stocks right awayYou can withdraw them after the next market day (T+1)Available to WithdrawThis shows the amount you can move from your Trading Wallet to your Raenest USD balance.Minimum withdrawal: $2Withdrawal fees: NoneWithdrawals can only go to your USD balance.Fees on stock tradesEach user gets one commission-free trade every month. After that, standard trading fees apply. Raenest charges a trading commission on every buy and sell:0.8% of the trade amountMinimum fee: $0.75If you’re buying from a non-USD balance, a currency conversion fee may also apply.​DividendsSome stocks pay dividends. When a company pays dividends:The payout is credited to your Trading WalletYou’ll get a notification once it’s processedInvestment limitsYour limits depend on your KYC level and apply daily:KYC LevelDaily Limit – Trading Wallet FundingDaily Limit – Buy StocksSell Stocks LimitWithdrawal LimitTier 1$7,000$7,000No limit$5,000Tier 2$10,000$10,000No limit$8,000Tier 3$12,000$12,000No limit$10,000Tier 4 & 5$15,000$15,000No limit$12,000A quick note on investingRaenest does not tell you what stocks to buy or sell. We provide:Access to the marketHelpful explanationsCurated categories to make discovery easierYour investment decisions are always yours. Stock prices can go up or down, and investing always carries risk.
